network Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual network Directory Reference(3)

NAME

network Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Directories


directory acip
directory consensus
directory mdns
directory nat
directory packet
directory rate_limit
directory tcp
directory webrtc
directory websocket

Files


file client.h
file compression.h
📦 Network Packet Compression Utilities file connection_attempt.h
Connection state machine and attempt logic for TCP/WebSocket clients. file crc32.h
Hardware-Accelerated CRC32 Checksum Computation. file dns.h
🌐 DNS resolution utilities file errors.h
Network error handling utilities. file frame_validator.h
Frame validation utilities for IMAGE_FRAME packets. file http_client.h
Simple HTTPS client for fetching public keys from GitHub/GitLab. file log.h
file network.h
🌐 Core network I/O operations with timeout support file parallel_connect.h
Parallel IPv4/IPv6 connection with race-to-connect semantics. file update_checker.h
🔄 Update checker for GitHub releases with DNS connectivity test and cache
